provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly still life concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional sci-fi, visible material texture and surface detail, visible brushstrokes, centered on plain dark grey background, scruffy ship cat lounging on warm engine housing, half-tabby with notched ear from some past adventure, slightly too thin but alert, rats are the real enemy, this cat has lived in low gravity and industrial spaces its whole life, working animal not pet, the Nostromo had one too
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, anime, cartoon, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new, glamorous, people, characters, hands, text, watermark, blurry, low quality

judgment.explanation: Creature/animal fitting the gritty space universe — working animal, vermin, or alien fauna.

assertions.rationale: Lighting reads correctly — warm upper-left with soft shadows
Palette is muted and dusty — no bright saturated colors
Full body, front-facing, plain background, correct fill
Colors muted and lived-in — no neon or bright saturated tones
Partially meets not generic sci-fi (no spandex/star trek/marvel/asset store) (65%)

canon_assertions.rationale: Lighting reads correctly — warm upper-left with soft shadows
Palette is muted and dusty — no bright saturated colors
Full body, front-facing, plain background, correct fill
Colors muted and lived-in — no neon or bright saturated tones
Partially meets not generic sci-fi (no spandex/star trek/marvel/asset store) (65%)

canon_explanation: Approved: passes 6/7 constitution rules.  Creature/animal fitting the gritty space universe — working animal, vermin, or alien fauna.
